meta.title: Geometric Invariants of the Autogenic Proto-Geometry
meta.description: Every physical constant as a geometric evaluation on D_IV^5. No series, no perturbation, no fitting.
meta.paper: Paper #83 — Geometric Invariants of the APG
meta.format: Each entry: symbol, name, BST formula, geometric source, value, observed, precision, theorem, toy, status

status_key.finite_sum: Finite sum over Bergman spectrum (<=137 terms)
status_key.series: Currently expressed as series, closed form unknown
status_key.missing: No BST expression yet — open problem
status_key.tension: BST value disagrees with observation beyond expected precision

next_priorities: W-15: Spectral zeta g-2 (full a_e as 137-term sum)
W-18: Individual quark masses (d,s,c,b), Lamb shift, hyperfine splitting
meta.inv4_audit: First pass complete. 4 tension flags resolved. T1437 corrected.
meta.inv4_phase2: W-54 observed values tightened for 7 entries
meta.elie_audit: Toy 1505: 45 tautological entries downgraded to structural, 3 confirmed as derived
meta.session_update: G-28 backfill: +24 entries (CKM matrix 10, gauge 5, leptons 5, quarks 4). Total now 1375.
meta.g29_update: G-29: +14 entries from gap domains (fluids 3, chemical_physics 4, observer_science 3, qft 2, electromagnetism 1, info_theory 1). 15 gap domains audited; 9 are structural/methodology (foundations, bst_physics, proof_complexity, linearization, classical_mech, quantum_foundations, quantum_mechanics, differential_geometry, optics) — no new numerical entries because they contain framework theorems, not predictions.
meta.g30_update: G-30: +4 entries (S_BH, sin(2beta), gravitino=N/A, Lambda running=0). 11/15 already in table. Honest catalog complete.

invariants.name: There is one geometry
invariants.geometric_source: The Autogenic Proto-Geometry. The unique bounded symmetric domain satisfying five simultaneous conditions. Everything derives from here.

invariants.name: Five integers determine everything
invariants.formula: rank=2, N_c=3, n_C=5, C₂=6, g=7 → N_max=137
invariants.geometric_source: The Cartan invariants of D_IV^5. Three independent (rank, N_c, n_C), two derived (C₂=rank·N_c, g=rank+n_C). Zero free parameters.

invariants.name: Grover speedup exponent
invariants.geometric_source: Quantum search speedup: N^(1/rank) = √N. Rank controls quantum advantage.

invariants.name: Quantum error threshold
invariants.geometric_source: Surface code threshold ≈ 1% ≈ α. The coupling constant IS the noise tolerance.

invariants.name: Non-linearizable fraction
invariants.geometric_source: Fraction of function space requiring depth 1 (Painlevé). The Gödel limit.

invariants.name: Linearizable fraction
invariants.geometric_source: Fraction of function space at depth 0. AC(0) completeness for this fraction.

invariants.name: BBN time as BST product
invariants.geometric_source: T1452: BBN onset = product of four sub-N_max integers. ALL four needed = all four thermally active. EXACT.

invariants.name: BST product 210 = C₂·g·n_C
invariants.geometric_source: Dark zone product. 210 = 2·3·5·7 = primorial(g). Casimir×genus×fiber. Physical meaning: TBD.

invariants.name: BST product 630 = C₂·N_c·g·n_C
invariants.geometric_source: All four odd primes × Casimir. 630 = rank·product(3,5,6,7) = 2·315. Physical meaning: TBD.

invariants.name: Cooperation threshold (numerical)
invariants.geometric_source: T583: Below f_crit, self-knowledge is free. Above, cooperation required.

invariants.name: Cooperation gap (numerical)
invariants.geometric_source: Gap between Gödel limit and cooperation threshold. Sociality forced by geometry.

invariants.name: Trust threshold
invariants.geometric_source: Fraction of consistent observations needed for trust. One deviation per N_max observations.

invariants.name: Punishment threshold (Hamilton)
invariants.geometric_source: Minimum relatedness for altruism. Hamilton's rule: r > c/b at r = 1/N_c.

invariants.name: Dictator game modal offer
invariants.geometric_source: Game theory: modal dictator offer ≈ 1/N_c. Observed 30-40% across cultures.

invariants.name: Ultimatum rejection threshold
invariants.geometric_source: Ultimatum game: offers below ~20% are rejected. f_crit = cooperation threshold.

invariants.name: Cowan's focused attention limit
invariants.geometric_source: Focused attention holds rank² = 4 items (Cowan 2001). vs Miller's g = 7.

invariants.name: Dunbar sympathy group

invariants.name: Dunbar band

invariants.name: Dunbar's number (BST)

invariants.name: Dunbar megaband

invariants.name: Fibonacci-BST closure

invariants.canonical_form: F₂=1, F₃=rank, F₄=N_c, F₅=n_C, F₆=rank³, F₇=13=2rank·N_c+1, F₈=N_c·(rank+n_C)=21

If w varies, BST needs the Bergman kernel to have a slow time-dependent mode — which would require a mechanism not currently in the theory. TEST: FALSIFIABLE: If DESI reaches 5 sigma for w != -1, BST must either find the time-dependent mode or acknowledge failure.

invariants.name: Edge case: Proton radius
invariants.geometric_source: MECHANISM: BST derives r_p from the Bergman kernel restricted to the N_c-color sector. The radius IS a spectral evaluation. The muonic/electronic puzzle resolved toward the muonic value — which is closer to BST. TEST: CONFIRMED: BST predicted the correct side of the puzzle.

invariants.name: Edge case: GZK cutoff

BST: the energy scale involves N_max (spectral cap bounds the interaction). Events above GZK = tunneling through the spectral boundary with probability alpha. TEST: SPECULATIVE: Needs calculation of BST tunneling rate through spectral cap.

invariants.name: Edge case: CDF W mass
invariants.geometric_source: MECHANISM: BST predicts m_W = 80369 MeV from the Weinberg angle and Fermi scale. CDF's 80434 disagrees. ATLAS and CMS remeasurements (2023-2025) converge toward the BST/SM value. BST predicts CDF had a systematic. TEST: CONFIRMED: ATLAS/CMS support BST value, not CDF.

invariants.name: Edge case: Neutrino ordering
invariants.geometric_source: MECHANISM: BST predicts normal ordering because the spectral tower λ_k = k(k+5) has lighter modes at lower k. The first generation (electron neutrino) couples to the lowest eigenvalue. Normal ordering = spectral ordering. TEST: TESTABLE: DUNE will determine ordering within 5 years. BST predicts normal.

invariants.name: Edge case: Lithium-7
invariants.geometric_source: MECHANISM: BST has Li7/H at 7% — better than LCDM's factor-3 discrepancy but still off. The lithium problem may require the BBN network to include BST's specific nuclear rates. The vacuum subtraction T1444 might correct the Li-7 production rate. TEST: OPEN: Needs BST-specific BBN network calculation.

T1444 IS the specific case. RFC IS the general principle. Every -1 correction is the ruler being subtracted. AC(0) depth 0: count everything except the ruler.
